## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Strapi and GrowthX teams to discuss content strategy, performance, and technical updates.](https://fathom.video/share/USP6vBgq2ZfWuwCYHe5smFPLjVxkfJrj?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content refresh strategy shifting to monthly updates due to LLM content surfacing](https://fathom.video/share/USP6vBgq2ZfWuwCYHe5smFPLjVxkfJrj?tab=summary&timestamp=72.0)
  - [New comparison pages automation pipeline ready; implementation starts next week](https://fathom.video/share/USP6vBgq2ZfWuwCYHe5smFPLjVxkfJrj?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Image generation workflow delayed; ETA early September](https://fathom.video/share/USP6vBgq2ZfWuwCYHe5smFPLjVxkfJrj?tab=summary&timestamp=186.0)
  - [Performance tracking to focus on top 10 performing content pieces for optimization](https://fathom.video/share/USP6vBgq2ZfWuwCYHe5smFPLjVxkfJrj?tab=summary&timestamp=594.0)

## Topics

### Content Refresh and New Content Updates

  - [New format: Links to Strapi documentation added to tops of refreshed articles](https://fathom.video/share/USP6vBgq2ZfWuwCYHe5smFPLjVxkfJrj?tab=summary&timestamp=88.0)
  - [Refreshing \~4 posts/week; 6-7 new blog posts moved to staging weekly](https://fathom.video/share/USP6vBgq2ZfWuwCYHe5smFPLjVxkfJrj?tab=summary&timestamp=390.0)
  - [Shifting to monthly content refreshes (previously quarterly) due to LLM content surfacing](https://fathom.video/share/USP6vBgq2ZfWuwCYHe5smFPLjVxkfJrj?tab=summary&timestamp=77.0)
  - [12 new pieces in pipeline for this week](https://fathom.video/share/USP6vBgq2ZfWuwCYHe5smFPLjVxkfJrj?tab=summary&timestamp=577.0)

### Technical Updates

  - [Staging automation in final stages; testing with this week's content](https://fathom.video/share/USP6vBgq2ZfWuwCYHe5smFPLjVxkfJrj?tab=summary&timestamp=313.0)
  - [Medium distribution credentials need updating (Victor to provide)](https://fathom.video/share/USP6vBgq2ZfWuwCYHe5smFPLjVxkfJrj?tab=summary&timestamp=330.0)
  - [Image generation workflow delayed due to adapting to Strapi guidelines and engineering prioritization](https://fathom.video/share/USP6vBgq2ZfWuwCYHe5smFPLjVxkfJrj?tab=summary&timestamp=129.0)

### Performance Tracking

  - [Victor requested top 10 performing content pieces for optimization](https://fathom.video/share/USP6vBgq2ZfWuwCYHe5smFPLjVxkfJrj?tab=summary&timestamp=594.0)
  - [Next.js and React integrations pages performing best](https://fathom.video/share/USP6vBgq2ZfWuwCYHe5smFPLjVxkfJrj?tab=summary&timestamp=715.0)
  - [Conversion events stable; tracked for overall website, not specific to GrowthX URLs](https://fathom.video/share/USP6vBgq2ZfWuwCYHe5smFPLjVxkfJrj?tab=summary&timestamp=1039.0)
  - [Anomalous traffic spike observed; cause unclear due to limited Google query data](https://fathom.video/share/USP6vBgq2ZfWuwCYHe5smFPLjVxkfJrj?tab=summary&timestamp=1244.0)

### Content Categorization and Tracking

  - [Using Airtable agent to categorize content into clusters](https://fathom.video/share/USP6vBgq2ZfWuwCYHe5smFPLjVxkfJrj?tab=summary&timestamp=934.0)
  - [Tracking content cohorts in Looker for performance analysis](https://fathom.video/share/USP6vBgq2ZfWuwCYHe5smFPLjVxkfJrj?tab=summary&timestamp=939.0)

### CTA and Conversion Tracking

  - [Inline CTA clicks tracked through funnel exploration report, not as specific events](https://fathom.video/share/USP6vBgq2ZfWuwCYHe5smFPLjVxkfJrj?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
  - [Team to review conversion trends monthly](https://fathom.video/share/USP6vBgq2ZfWuwCYHe5smFPLjVxkfJrj?tab=summary&timestamp=1174.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Increase content volume in drafts for faster review process](https://fathom.video/share/USP6vBgq2ZfWuwCYHe5smFPLjVxkfJrj?tab=summary&timestamp=423.0)
  - [Add number of posts/pages published to weekly performance report](https://fathom.video/share/USP6vBgq2ZfWuwCYHe5smFPLjVxkfJrj?tab=summary&timestamp=370.0)
  - [Filter out pre-existing integration pages from performance tracking](https://fathom.video/share/USP6vBgq2ZfWuwCYHe5smFPLjVxkfJrj?tab=summary&timestamp=861.0)
  - [Review and address Theodore's previous content suggestions](https://fathom.video/share/USP6vBgq2ZfWuwCYHe5smFPLjVxkfJrj?tab=summary&timestamp=508.0)
  - [Implement comparison pages automation starting next week](https://fathom.video/share/USP6vBgq2ZfWuwCYHe5smFPLjVxkfJrj?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Continue prioritizing content to close gaps with competitors](https://fathom.video/share/USP6vBgq2ZfWuwCYHe5smFPLjVxkfJrj?tab=summary&timestamp=1058.0)
  - [Pass message to developers: stage content without deleting during tests](https://fathom.video/share/USP6vBgq2ZfWuwCYHe5smFPLjVxkfJrj?tab=summary&timestamp=1465.0)
